_publications._publicationTitle: Therapeutic Vulnerability to ATR Inhibition in Concurrent

_contextSnippet: The NF1-associated glioblastoma cell line JHH-NF1-GBM1, which carries an ATRX mutation and exhibits ALT, grows under neurosphere conditions and intracranially as orthotopic xenografts, albeit slowly
details: Grows under neurosphere conditions and intracranially as orthotopic xenografts, albeit slowly
